title: Create Adventures Origins
description:
This is a version of the modpack create adventures that includes the origin mod as an extra twist.
This Pack is designed to enhance the default create experience and add an adventurous feel to it!
body:
**This Pack is designed to enhance the default create experience and add an adventurous feel to it and also adding Origins as an extra twist!**


![Create Adventures Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a386a16e3787bee2fe99ebfd683e15eb39a538.png)

## Features:
- **Create!** (and many addons)
  ![Create! (Showcase)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54c180acbc6392d7c03efc4896ba44e5baa7e99.png)
- **New world generation!** (Tectonic)
![Tectonic (Mountain Range)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb47cb197233e8998d6bfe3a4e4f64e6e1bd64f3.png)
- **New Mobs!** (Alex's Mobs)
![Alex´s Mobs (gorilla)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57c9e1f49933d39fb9b73fbfa6d68fe6111e911b.png)
### **and many more!..**
- **Origins!** (Origins)
- ![Origins! (Origins list)](https://i.imgur.com/617o2yF.png)


_Message me on Discord for Questions/Requests/Feedback
"blizzard8562"_


**OUTDATED:**
